arcade.name: Millrace Arcade
arcade.summary: Playable browser games from Millrace, led by Corebound's v0.2.0 continuation release.

games.title: Corebound
games.summary: Descend through five depth bands while contracts, archive sets, Survey relay reputation, scanner sweeps, route beacons, and coolant bursts open non-cash progression beyond ore profit.

release.label: v0.2.0 continuity
release.copy: Contracts, archive sigils, relay reputation, scanner sweeps, route beacons, and coolant support now connect the mine run to visible long-term progression.

versions.label: v0.2.0 continuity
versions.summary: Contracts, archive sigils, relay reputation, scanner sweeps, route beacons, and coolant support now connect the mine run to visible long-term progression.
